MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Shawn S. Salehieh, Esq., appearingfor Plaintiff Fred Baker.
Plaintiff Fred Baker present in court.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Jamisi Calloway.
Defendant Jamisi Calloway was given Notice of Time and Place of Trial by the court.
Rejection of Award and Request for Trial was filed on September 7, 2012 by Plaintiff.
Plaintiff Fred Baker sworn and examined on his own behalf.

After evidence, Court ordered Judgment in favor of Plaintiff. Plaintiff does not have to return the $10,000 already paid. Court allowed cost to be included.
Counsel for Plaintiff to submit a proposed judgment within five days.
